# Unity auto-generated stuff
Library/
Temp/
Logs/
obj/
Build/
Builds/

# Package cache
Packages/
PackageManager/

# Unity meta files (usually not needed)
*.meta

# Asset store stuff you didn't write
Assets/TextMeshPro/
Assets/Plugins/

# Large binary assets
Assets/**/*.png
Assets/**/*.jpg
Assets/**/*.fbx
Assets/**/*.wav
Assets/**/*.mp3
Assets/**/*.mp4

# VS project files
*.csproj
*.sln
.vs/
